title: BanbanCraft
body:
The Minecraft Banban MOD is here! 

In version 1.0, we have Jumbo Josh, Banban and Banbaleena working and in the game.

The MOD will be updated with more characters from the "Garten Of Banban" franchise in the future, so make sure to follow the project.

Available For Forge 1.19.4 & 1.20.1, Geckolib is a required dependency.
